ExecutorKind.description: The kind of outbound executor that produced a response.

oneOf.description: All outbound is denied; no network performed.
Fake/deterministic fixture executor; no real network.

RedactionState.description:
Redaction state for an outbound audit record.

Every outbound request carries one of these states to indicate whether raw body/header/prompt/response data was preserved. The default is `NotCaptured` — raw data is never saved unless explicitly approved.

oneOf.description: Raw data was redacted before recording.
Only a policy reference is stored; no data captured.
Request was blocked as unsafe; no data recorded.
Explicit user/host approval to capture raw data (rare).

Payload.description: Response returned by a git outbound executor.

executor_kind.description: What kind of executor produced this response.

network_performed.description: Whether real network I/O was performed.

redaction_state.description: Redaction state applied to the response.

resolved_commit_sha.description: Resolved commit SHA, when known. Empty for deny-all/default responses.

resolved_content_hash.description: Full-tree content hash, when known. Empty for deny-all/default responses.

resolved_path.description: Host-selected install root subdir / opaque ref. Must not expose raw secrets.

Payload.title: GitOutboundResponse

description: Payload schema for event kind kernel/v1/git_fetch.completed.
title: kernel/v1/git_fetch.completed
